article.title: Tutorials
article.text: You can create an application using the My Applications page in the account management portal. Ensure your application has a memorable name and that you keep its secret key secure and private.

image.alt: Click on the Create Application Button
image.caption: Click on the Create Application Button

image.alt: You can then edit your Application by clicking on the Edit Button
image.caption: You can then edit your Application by clicking on the Edit Button
